messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?

I received the email reply below from Mr Naziry, regarding the email I Rocco sent to Mr. Chinnappa- the LDV General manager; Prepare an email for me-Rocco to Mr Naziry to say, I have no objection in attending another dealer, subject to (as you must be aware) based on my email trail with Parramatta service dealership and Mr. Mason the dealer Principal, that all I expect, is permanent fix to the warranty faults I have highlighted, and are persisting. I no longer wish to be misled continuously as always by a false claim that e faults have been fixed by a software update, only to find that they still persist, which has always been the standard response from LDV. Moreover, my core expectation is quite simple, which is to be able to utilize my LDV T60 for its intended purpose and function, free of persisting faults:     

{On Fri, 28 Jul 2023 at 17:58, Palvasha Naziry <<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>> wrote:

Good Evening Rocco,
 
Thank you for your email, and apologies for the delayed response.
 
To resolve this matter, would you be open to attending another LDV dealership to have your concerns inspected at no cost to you?
 
Have a lovely weekend.
 
Kind Regards,
 <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
CUSTOMER RELATIONS MANAGER
 
From: Rocco Verrelli <rlverrelli@gmail.com>
Sent: Thursday, July 27, 2023 3:04 PM
To: Dinesh Chinnappa <<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>>; AU Ateco Reception <info@ateco.com.au>
Cc: Palvasha Naziry <<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>>; Ben Neal <<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>>
Subject: Re: Complaint - Failure to Address Warranty Faults - LDV T60 Vehicle Reg. ENL76J
 
Dear Mr. Chinnappa,

I am writing to follow up on the email I sent almost three weeks ago regarding the warranty faults with my LDV T60. Regrettably, I haven't received any response or acknowledgment from you or Mr. Mason, the Dealer Principal. This situation is causing me additional distress and intense grief as it remains unresolved.

I kindly request your assistance in obtaining a permanent resolution from Mr. Mason on this matter as soon as possible.

His proposed conditions for resolution are inadequate as they fail to effectively address the faults. I am left feeling besieged and helpless. Please intervene and bring about a lasting resolution to this predicament. My expectation is to be able to use my LDV T60 without the persistent issues that have caused distress for three years.

Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter.

Regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>}

Dear Mr. Naziry,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing in response to your previous email regarding the concerns I raised in my email to Mr. Chinnappa. Firstly, I would like to express my gratitude for your prompt response and offer to resolve the matter by attending another LDV dealership at no cost.

I would like to clarify that I have no objection in attending another dealer to have my concerns inspected. However, I want to emphasize that this decision is subject to the understanding that, based on my previous email trail with the Parramatta service dealership and Mr. Mason, the dealer Principal, my core expectation is a permanent fix to the warranty faults I have highlighted. These faults have been persisting and have caused significant inconvenience and frustration for me.

I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist. This has become the standard response from LDV, and it has eroded my trust in the brand. Therefore, it is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed, allowing me to utilize my LDV T60 as intended, free from any persisting issues.

I appreciate your attention to this matter and your continued support in finding a satisfactory resolution. Please convey my concerns to Mr. Chinnappa and Mr. Mason, emphasizing the importance of addressing these issues effectively and permanently.

Thank you for your understanding and assistance. I look forward to a prompt and positive response.

Kind regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Please check the following for grammar:
Dear Mr. Naziry,

Thank you for your response on behalf of Mr Chinnappa and your offer to resolve the matter by attending another LDV dealership at no cost.
 
I would like to clarify that I have no objection in attending another dealer to have my concerns inspected. However, I want to emphasise that this solution is on the understanding, according to my previous email trail with Mr Chinnappa, and Mr Masons and his dealership team, that the detailed warranty faults are not just inspected, they are also permanently fixed.

This has always been my core issue, that these warranty faults which are continuing to cause me significant pain, intense grief and frustration, not to mention driving safety risk and road hazard issues, as you would be aware, have persistent and have remained unresolved for the past (3) three years, so my sole expectation is to have these issue permanently fixed. 
 
I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist.  Which has become the standard response from LDV, and it has eroded my trust in the brand. Therefore, it is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed, allowing me to utilize my LDV T60 as intended, free from any persisting issues.

I appreciate your attention to this matter and your continued support in finding a satisfactory resolution. Please convey my concerns to Mr. Chinnappa, emphasising the importance of addressing these issues effectively and permanently.

I look forward to a positive response.

Regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear Mr. Naziry,

Thank you for your response on behalf of Mr. Chinnappa and your offer to resolve the matter by attending another LDV dealership at no cost.

I would like to clarify that I have no objection to attending another dealer to have my concerns inspected. However, I want to emphasize that this solution is based on the understanding, as per my previous email trail with Mr. Chinnappa and Mr. Mason, and his dealership team, that the detailed warranty faults are not only inspected but also permanently fixed.

My core issue is that these warranty faults have caused me significant pain, intense grief, and frustration for the past three years. They also pose driving safety risks and road hazard issues. Therefore, my sole expectation is to have these issues permanently resolved.

I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist. This has become the standard response from LDV and has eroded my trust in the brand. It is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed so that I can utilize my LDV T60 as intended, without any persisting issues.

I appreciate your attention to this matter and your continued support in finding a satisfactory resolution. Please convey my concerns to Mr. Chinnappa, emphasizing the importance of addressing these issues effectively and permanently.

I look forward to a positive response.

Regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Please include in the email that these unresolved warranty faults  have not just caused (in the past), but  it is continuing  to cause me significant pain, extreme grief, and stress

Dear Mr. Naziry,

Thank you for your response on behalf of Mr. Chinnappa and your offer to resolve the matter by attending another LDV dealership at no cost.

I would like to clarify that I have no objection to attending another dealer to have my concerns inspected. However, I want to emphasize that this solution is based on the understanding, as per my previous email trail with Mr. Chinnappa and Mr. Mason, and his dealership team, that the detailed warranty faults are not only inspected but also permanently fixed.

It is important to note that these unresolved warranty faults have not just caused me significant pain, intense grief, and frustration in the past, but they continue to cause me substantial distress, extreme grief, and stress. These ongoing issues have had a profound impact on my daily life and overall well-being.

I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist. This recurring disappointment has further deepened my frustration and eroded the trust I had in LDV as a reputable brand. Therefore, it is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed, providing me with the peace of mind and ability to utilize my LDV T60 as intended, free from any persisting issues.

I appreciate your attention to this matter and your continued support in finding a satisfactory resolution. Please convey my concerns to Mr. Chinnappa, emphasizing the urgency and importance of addressing these issues effectively and permanently.

I look forward to a positive response.

Regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Please  correct the following paragraph: It is important to note that these unresolved warranty faults have not just caused me significant pain and intense grief, and have also posed driving safety risks and road hazards. These issues have persisted unresolved, as you are aware over the past three years, have continued to cause me substantial anguish and extreme distress. These ongoing issues have had a profound impact on my daily life and overall well-being.

It is important to note that these unresolved warranty faults have not only caused me significant pain and intense grief but have also posed driving safety risks and road hazards. These issues have persisted unresolved, as you are aware, over the past three years and continue to cause me substantial anguish and extreme distress. These ongoing issues have had a profound impact on my daily life and overall well-being.

Please correct the following paragraph for grammar  and impact on the reader :  It is important to note that these unresolved warranty faults have not only caused me significant pain and intense grief but have also posed driving safety risks and road hazards. These ongoing issues which have now persisted unresolved, as you are aware, for over (3) three years are continuing to cause me substantial anguish, pain and extreme distress, and are continuing to have had a profound impact on my daily life and overall well-being.

It is crucial to acknowledge that these unresolved warranty faults have caused me not only significant pain and intense grief but have also posed ongoing driving safety risks and road hazards. The continued persistence of these issues, as you are well aware, for over three years, has perpetuated substantial anguish, pain, and extreme distress in my life. The impact on my daily life and overall well-being cannot be overstated.

does the following  correct:  . It is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed so that I can utilise my LDV T60 functionality and features, for its intended purpose, without any persisting issues.

Yes, the following sentence is correct: "It is crucial for me to be assured that the identified faults will be permanently fixed so that I can utilize my LDV T60's functionality and features for its intended purpose, without any persisting issues."
Great! I'm glad the sentence is correct. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask.

Is the following correct: I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims such as  being told the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist.

Yes, the following sentence is correct: "I no longer wish to be continuously misled by false claims, such as being told that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to discover that they still persist."
